title: astragalus nebraskensis
intro: Astragalus nebraskensis, also known as Nebraska milkvetch, is a perennial legume plant native to the Great Plains region of North America. It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and immunomodulatory effects. The health benefits of Astragalus nebraskensis include reducing fatigue and improving physical performance, as well as supporting immune function and reducing the risk of infection. Astragalus nebraskensis can be prepared as a tea, capsule, or tincture, and is often combined with other herbs in traditional Chinese medicine formulas.
